grant_title: Grants to Expand Youth Programming Citywide
project_area: Youth programming focused on STEAM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, Mathematics), mental health, and equity-centered community engagement
demographic_requirements: Programs must support youth and families in Jersey City, with a focus on equity and accessibility for underserved communities
eligibility_summary: Open to Jersey City-based nonprofits, community organizations, and educational institutions with programs addressing opioid prevention through STEAM, youth mental health, and equity-centered engagement. Applicants must demonstrate strong program design, measurable impact, and organizational capacity. Funding tiers include Summer, Schoolyear, and Year-Long Programming with awards ranging from $7,000 to $46,500.
